Donate

Train up a child in the way he should go, and when he is old he will not depart from it.

Proverbs 22:6

Our Vision

To help children develop a personal relationship with Lord Jesus Christ and grow spiritually by knowing the Word of God from an early age.

"And Jesus increased in wisdom and stature, and in favor with God and men" (Luke 2:52). Our ministry goes beyond merely babysitting; we focus on teaching children to achieve holistic growth in the likeness of Christ.

Our Core Values

Biblical Foundation

All our lessons are Christ-centered, based on the Bible, and tailored to be understood by children's minds.

Holistic Development

We encourage children to mature spiritually, intellectually, and socially.

Language and Cultural Connection

We help children in the diaspora adapt to the lifestyle in Germany without forgetting their own culture and language.

Safety and Protection Guidelines

To ensure parents can bring their children with full confidence, we uphold the following safety standards

Qualified Teachers

Our ministers are carefully selected, spiritually grounded, and receive ongoing training in childcare and pedagogy.

Clean and Comfortable Environment

Our classrooms are clean, child-friendly, and secured against potential hazards.

Supervision System

We handle this ministry with high responsibility. To prevent children from harming themselves or being affected by external influences, they are never left unsupervised.

Parental Communication

Parents participate based on a set schedule and have the right to observe the ministry or request information at any time.

Children's Fellowship

We offer various activities to make children eager to come to church. By singing, praying, and eating together, we lay the foundation for their future brotherhood and sisterhood.

Continuity of Service

Our ministry guides children from the time they join the church until they reach the age of water baptism. After baptism, they transition into the Youth Ministry.

Answering Children's Questions

In collaboration with parents, we strive to answer children's spiritual and personal questions, providing guidance for their next steps in life.
